tooltip.reachcrafting.enabled: Whether any of the mod's features are enabled.
tooltip.reachcrafting.enable_nearby_cont: Controls all ability to pull from and put back items to nearby containers. If disabled, the mod will only use items from your player inventory during crafting.
tooltip.reachcrafting.count_preference: Controls whether nearby crafting prefers higher-count or lower-count variants when multiple valid choices exist.
tooltip.reachcrafting.redistribute_to_cr: Allow already-filled interchangeable slots to be rebalanced when that would craft more items.
tooltip.reachcrafting.show_nearby_crafta: Show the orange recipe-book indicator when cached nearby containers suggest a missing recipe can be crafted from local storage.
tooltip.reachcrafting.cache_containers_f: Remember observed nearby container contents to power the recipe-book indicator and speed up Ctrl-assisted nearby searches.
tooltip.reachcrafting.reach_craft_hold_a: When enabled, plain Ctrl recipe clicks are queued while Ctrl is held and replayed one at a time when you release the key.
tooltip.reachcrafting.revolving_craft_ha: Controls how rotating generic recipe-book entries choose sibling variants during Ctrl-assisted crafting.
tooltip.reachcrafting.input_counter_visi: Choose when the recipe-book input count is shown. Always Show keeps the badge synced to the current crafting grid and lets scrolling continue from that amount. Show While Queueing only shows the badge while Ctrl or Shift queueing is active.
tooltip.reachcrafting.reach_craft_close_: Automatically close the recipe variant overlay after releasing the modifier key. This allows the crafting grid to be immediately refocused for keyboard input.
tooltip.reachcrafting.reach_craft_prefer: When planning a craft, prioritize using items already in your player inventory before withdrawing from nearby chests.
tooltip.reachcrafting.blacklisted_contai: Ignored container types during scans. Can be overriden by the in-world whitelist (in any mode)
tooltip.reachcrafting.auto_focus_search: Automatically focus the recipe book search bar when opening supported crafting grids if the recipe book is visible.
tooltip.reachcrafting.put_pulled_resourc: When you close the crafting grid, automatically return any items pulled from nearby containers back to where they came from.
tooltip.reachcrafting.restore_inventory_: If you exit the crafting grid while items are still in it, attempt to return them to their original slots in your inventory.
tooltip.reachcrafting.in_world_filter_mo: If this setting is not None, hold ctrl with a container open to see its state and change by clicking the dot. White = whitelist, black = blacklist, gray = unset / neither
tooltip.reachcrafting.show_filter_outlin: Draw a black (for blacklist) or white (for whitelist) wireframe box around filtered containers in the world within 16 blocks.
tooltip.reachcrafting.show_total_output_: Display the total number of items that will be produced by crafting everything currently in the grid plus any queued items.
tooltip.reachcrafting.scroll_to_pull: Hold Shift and scroll over the output slot to pull items directly into your inventory (down) or to your cursor (up).
tooltip.reachcrafting.remember_previous_: Restore the last used search query when opening the recipe book.
tooltip.reachcrafting.type_to_focus_sear: Automatically focus and highlight the search bar when you start typing while the recipe book is visible.
tooltip.reachcrafting.auto_craft_mode: Enable the experimental automated crafting system triggered by the Alt key.
